name: hf-storage-estimate
description: Estimate HuggingFace model storage requirements from test collection logs
prompt:
Analyze {{log_file}} and estimate the total HuggingFace storage required for all models listed.

Parse the log file to extract model identifiers, estimate storage for each model based on parameter counts, and generate a comprehensive report including:
- Total storage estimate
- Breakdown by model family/category
- List of largest models
- CSV export for spreadsheet analysis
- Summary report in markdown

The log file typically contains pytest test paths with model names like:
- test_all_models_torch[model_family/variant-single_device-inference]
- Or other formats with model identifiers

Generate reports in the same directory as the log file with prefix matching the log filename.
author: Claude Code User

parameters.name: log_file
parameters.description: Path to the log file containing model test collection output
